author: lOrm
content: Closed: SSE per-line accumulator now capped at MAX_SSE_LINE_BYTES = 1 MiB. enforce_sse_line_cap clears the buffer and reports discarded_bytes when an unterminated line crosses the cap; the wrapper emits an AppEvent::ApiError and a tracing::warn so operators see the trip. cargo test --lib: 1447/1447 pass (incl. 5 new #695 tests). cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings: exit 0. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
